prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Subaru EN07 660cc turbocharged inline-4 (EN07Z)** with forged internals: **JE 83mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **ACL Race Series bearings** for 12,000 RPM reliability. Pair with a **Garrett GT12 turbo (GT1241Z, .41 A/R, 55 trim)** on a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold** with **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) peak boost.

Full **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** standalone management with **Bosch 1000cc EV14 injectors**, **ID1000 fuel pump**, and **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator**. Custom **EN07Z-specific camshafts (272° duration, 11.5mm lift)** from **Tomei Powered** with **Supertech valve springs/retainers** and **Ferrea 5000 series valves** for high-RPM stability. **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** and **Setrab 19-row oil cooler** for thermal management.

Chassis reinforcement with **Cusco 4-point bolt-in roll cage (Sambar-specific fitment)** and **Hardrace adjustable spherical bearing rear trailing arms** to eliminate subframe flex. **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV 2-way adjustable, 30-way rebound)** with **Eibach 15mm front/12mm rear sway bars** and **SuperPro polyurethane bushings (full kit)** for Kei-class weight reduction (650kg target). **Brembo 4-piston calipers (Subaru Vivio RS-R spec)** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for stopping power.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Sambar Dias widebody kit** (fiberglass, 100mm flares) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-printed mold, 3K twill weave)** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1.5m span, 300mm chord, 3° adjustable)** for downforce. **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders** in **raw carbon fiber (no clear coat)** with **custom LED DRLs (Osram 10W CRI90, 6000K)** integrated into the bumper.

**Work Equip 03 wheels (13x6 +38 front, 13x7 +35 rear)** in **gunmetal finish** with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (175/50R13 front, 195/45R13 rear)**. **Custom rear diffuser (aluminum, 3D-milled)** with **dual 3-inch titanium exhaust tips (Akrapovic)** and **LED underglow (Lumileds Luxeon Z ES, 4000K, 1200lm)** hidden behind the side skirts.

**Full Respray in Subaru Sonic Blue Pearl (L685) with matte black roof** and **custom gold leaf pinstriping (24K, 1mm width)** on the fenders. **Recaro SRD Kei seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara/leatherette hybrid)** with **Schroth 4-point harnesses** and **custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (13-inch, suede, 6-bolt pattern)**. **JDM-spec amber turn signals (Koito)** and **custom carbon fiber mirror caps (OEM-style, 3D-scanned)** for OEM+ aggression.
